---
title: "outputs"
format: html
css: styles.css
---

# Preliminary findings

The next documents present the preliminary findings of the research project. These are based on the presentations we have made at different academic conferences, seminars and workshops.

::::: {.grid .custom-grid}
::: grid-item
![Alt text](images/Strand1_Impact.png)
:::

::: grid-item
Here is some text that goes into the second column. You can write as much text as you want here.
:::
:::::
